arts.ttl: Opposition player claims Rangers ‘back in trouble’ – Philippe Clement under ‘more pressure’
arts.sum: Rangers had to settle for a draw with Hibernian last weekend as Rocky Bushiri starred against Philippe Clement’s side. Hamza Igamane opened the scoring for Rangers in the fourth minute before he doubled the lead in the 19th minute. Bushiri assisted Martin Boyle’s first goal for Hibernian before the latter equalised on the hour mark. The post Opposition player claims Rangers ‘back in trouble’ – Philippe Clement under ‘more pressure’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Second club now interested in Rangers player – Meeting takes place, decision for Philippe Clement’s side
arts.sum: There’s a claim in the Turkish media that Trabzonspor are also in the race to sign Rangers defender Rıdvan Yılmaz. There have been reports in recent days that Rangers could offload the Turkey international despite Philippe Clement starting him in the past three games.
